tickets.title: Add dark mode toggle
tickets.description: Implement a user-facing dark/light theme switch. Persist preference in localStorage.

comments.author: morgan
comments.text: Design mockups are in Figma — link in #design-tokens Slack thread.

tickets.title: Fix login session timeout
tickets.description: Users are being logged out after ~5 minutes regardless of activity. Likely a sliding-window bug in the session middleware.

comments.author: sam
comments.text: Reproduced locally. The session TTL is being reset from creation time, not last activity.

comments.author: morgan
comments.text: This is blocking the demo — please prioritise.

tickets.title: Migrate CI pipeline to GitHub Actions
tickets.description: Replace the legacy Jenkins setup with GitHub Actions workflows. Cover lint, test, and deploy stages.
